General.Name: Hing Ming Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Hing Ming Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides rental services for temporary suspended working platforms and other equipment in Hong Kong. The company provides rental services of construction equipment, including tower cranes and generators. It also engages in trading of equipment and spare parts including permanent suspended working platforms, motors, and wire rope, as well as offers installation, dismantling, commissioning, servicing, maintaining, jacking up or down, and inspection services; and transportation of tower cranes. In addition, the company provides project management and construction consulting services. Hing Ming Holdings Limited was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Kowloon, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Tsim Sha Tsui Mansion, Kowloon, Hong Kong
